productDisplayName: Nike Men Grey Air Twilight Shoes
description: Style Note There's nothing better than a lightweight technical shoe that provides loads of comfort and durability. The nike Air Twilight Mid shoe is a powerful sneaker, with its simple style and extremely durable construction. Product Details Suede upper with synthetic overlays for durability Meshed and padded collar and tongue for all day comfort High ankle collar and heel cup for better support to the lower leg Lacing system for snug, customised Fit with a velcro closure across the foot Removable foot-bed to accommodate an orthotic Nike swoosh on either sides and brand name on the collar PU midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort Durable rubber outsole with flex grooves for traction and absolute grip Waffle patterned lugs on the outsole Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
